param_conventions: activate_project: --project (NOT --path). find_symbol: --name_path_pattern (NOT --name_path). find_referencing_symbols: --name_path (NOT --name_path_pattern) + --relative_path (FILE, not dir). search_for_pattern: --substring_pattern (literal). Use JSON stdin pipe with '.' sentinel for multi-param.
gotchas: Bare receiver-method names return [] from find_symbol - must qualify as '(*Type).method'. get_symbols_overview reveals the qualified form. 23 tools stable for 16 runs (Runs 4-19). find_symbol can take 70s+ for broad name_path_pattern - prefer Grep for simple name lookups. find_symbol REQUIRES name_path_pattern; find_referencing_symbols REQUIRES name_path. activate_project elapsed ~1.3s warm, ~6.7s cold; project name 'gh-aw' (auto-created on first activate, takes ~7.3s on fresh container Run 17/19). get_symbols_overview ~100ms on focused file. find_referencing_symbols ~2.1s on Analyzer symbol with 2 refs. Bash sandbox blocks `go build` and `find/ls/mkdir` outside /home/runner/work/gh-aw/gh-aw; static analysis via Grep+Read only. Compound 'mkdir && ls' is split-checked. R18: gh CLI v2.83.0 in sandbox emits 'Malformed version:' on stderr when --json/--state filters used on `gh issue list` — workaround: use `gh api search/issues?q=...` direct. gh api search/issues returns a recursive envelope when total_count is real — filter with `--jq '.items[] | select(.html_url) | ...'` to keep only true matches. Grep for `\binterface\{\}` returns spurious 3677 hits because regex word-boundary matches `interface{...}` non-empty too — use `interface\{\}` without `\b` for true empty-interface literal count. R19: `gh issue view <N> --json state,title,number,labels` works fine (no version warning). safeoutputs JSON stdin via `. < file.json` worked first try.
